message:
feat: implement fast daemon execution with instance reuse

Replace CoW memory snapshots with simpler instance reuse pattern:
- Create single WASM instance at daemon startup
- Initialize QuickJS runtime once via _start (EDGEBOX_SERVE_MODE=1)
- Reuse same instance for all subsequent requests
- Call edgebox_serve_exec() directly for ~100μs execution times

Performance results:
- Cold start: ~540ms (vs Bun 17ms, Node 58ms)
- Daemon warm request: ~0.3-0.5ms (60x faster than Bun cold start)

The CoW approach was abandoned due to malloc hanging after memory
restore - dlmalloc's internal state becomes inconsistent when
restored via mmap(MAP_PRIVATE).

Changes:
- src/wasm_main.zig: Add edgebox_serve_exec, isServeMode, initializeServeMode
- src/edgebox_wamr.zig: Instance reuse in daemon mode, custom WAMR allocator
